com._1c.v8.ibis.admin

Class SecurityProfileVirtualDirectory

  • java.lang.Object
    • com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.SecurityProfileVirtualDirectory
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ISecurityProfileVirtualDirectory

    public final class SecurityProfileVirtualDirectory
extends Object
implements ISecurityProfileVirtualDirectory
    Description of an allowed virtual directory of a security profile of a 1C:Enterprise cluster

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      String getAlias()
      Gets the logical URL of a virtual directory
      boolean getAllowedRead()
      Gets the value of the flag that shows whether reading from the virtual directory is allowed

      Gets the value of the flag that shows whether writing to the virtual directory is allowed

      Gets virtual directory description

      Gets the physical URL of a virtual directory
